sentiment: Boundaries hold, boundaries break — the shape of what contains us tells us what we are.

stories.title: Elixir v1.20: Now a gradually typed language
stories.summary: Elixir crossed the typed-untyped divide — a language known for flexibility added guardrails without losing its soul. The debate over whether you need types to build at scale continues, but now Elixir lets you decide for yourself.

stories.title: I was recently diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis
stories.summary: Andrew Gallant (burntsushi), the creator of ripgrep, shared a raw personal account of a rare autoimmune disease attacking his brain. The same sharp mind that built foundational tools turned inward, documenting the dismantling of his own cognition.

stories.title: Pwnd Blaster: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
stories.summary: A creative exploit chain that weaponizes sound — turning a speaker into an attack vector you can't patch with software alone. The boundary between physical and digital security dissolves when your own hardware becomes the threat.
